metadata.name: Exchange Tickets for a Different Day

description: A theater patron wants to exchange their tickets for Tuesday's performance to Wednesday's performance of the same show.

nodes.task_description: Look up the patron's original order for Tuesday's show.
Check for availability of comparable seats for Wednesday's performance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds comparable seats are available.

nodes.task_description: Process the exchange in the ticketing system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent voids the Tuesday tickets and issues new tickets for Wednesday.

nodes.task_description: Email the new tickets for Wednesday's performance to the patron.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the new digital tickets.
